title: Oni's Blood
overview: Teenager Shiki is attacked by a mysterious man. As his foster father Tsuyoshi helps him flee, he learns of his surprising and legendary heritage.

title: If You Want to Make It, Keep On Winning
overview: Shiki wakes up confused in front of Naito, who explains the situation between the Oni and the Momotaro.

title: Blood Eclipse Release
overview: The first test the boys face to enter the academy is playing "demon catcher."

title: Work with Me
overview: If they want to pass the test their teacher has given them, students must work together.

title: Bad News
overview: The students reach the Kyoto underground and discover new things about the war they are involved in.

title: Even the Loner Path Has Its Limits
overview: The undead attack the students and Shiki is forced to make a decision that will change his mind.

title: The Beauty is a Beast
overview: Yomogi uses his power to seal off the underground and the students must fight to survive.

title: The Unreliable Hero
overview: Kuina fights a battle against another ugly, but this time he finds himself in a very delicate situation.

title: Momotaro Spirit
overview: The riots affect the security of the temple and the students must evacuate the people as soon as possible.

title: Kishin's Child
overview: Samidare visits the Momotaro headquarters in Tokyo. Brushing off fellow agent Shinya's provocations, he declares he will be the one to kill Shiki.

title: Thank You!
overview: Overwhelmed by Shiki's intense flames, a wounded Tsubakiri recalls the promise he made to his mentor, Manaka — the man whose corpse he controls.

title: Day of the Storm
overview: A storm catches the boys by surprise and they have to stay locked up for a night.

title: Mikado, Like Gate of the Gods
overview: The boys have time to go to a local festival and Shiki meets someone mysterious.

title: Personal Rule
overview: Momotaro's surveillance network detects what happened in the city center and responds immediately.

title: Found You
overview: Shinya is looking for the academy students to carry out the plan he has in mind.

title: Not So Bad
overview: A kidnapping, a hostage, and a secret plan intertwine in an attempt to find Shiki's whereabouts.

title: The Vengeful Oni
overview: Jin reminisces about everything he experienced during his childhood.

title: Haunted by Doubt
overview: The squadrons are set in motion as doubts creep in about what's coming.

title: The Voice of the Weak
overview: Mikado meets Shiki and reveals who he is, but Shiki doesn't know why he knows his name or what he's plotting.

title: Rage vs. Rage
overview: After awakening as an Oni, Shiki Ichinose must master his power and join the age-old war against the Momotaro.

title: Flawless Fortune
overview: The tarot cards and their position can tip the balance of the fight one way or the other.

title: A Futile Battle
overview: During the battle, Shinya remembers his past and what motivated him to aspire to get where he is today.

title: My Friend
overview: After awakening as an Oni, Shiki Ichinose must master his power and join the age-old war against the Momotaro.

title: Until We Meet Again
overview: After the battle, everyone must re-evaluate their destiny and the next steps that need to be taken.
